B

baseUrl(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient.Builder

Sets a base URL used for relative paths.

Sets the base URL from config.

Sets the base URL from config.

Adds an Authorization bearer token when the token is not blank.

Adds an Authorization bearer token when the token is not blank.

Returns the underlying runtime binding.

Creates a profile builder.

Creates a builder without auto-loading configuration.

Creates a builder without auto-loading configuration.

Overrides the underlying HTTP client.

close() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile
 
config() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Returns the resolved configuration instance.

Overrides the configuration instance.
config(HttpClientConfig) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClient.Builder
Overrides the configuration instance.
configure(BiConsumer<C, MagicHttpClient.Builder>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClientProfile.Builder
Applies a builder customization that can read the config instance.
configure(BiConsumer<C, MagicWebSocketClient.Builder>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder
Applies a builder customization that can read the config instance.
configure(Consumer<MagicHttpClient.Builder>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClientProfile.Builder
Applies a builder customization that does not depend on config.
configure(Consumer<MagicWebSocketClient.Builder>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder
Applies a builder customization that does not depend on config.
connect(String, WebSocket.Listener) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClient
Connects to a WebSocket endpoint (blocking).
connectAsync(String, WebSocket.Listener) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClient
Connects to a WebSocket endpoint asynchronously.
connectSmart(String, WebSocket.Listener) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClient
Connects to a WebSocket endpoint, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.
connectTimeout(Duration) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient.Builder
Overrides connect timeout.
connectTimeout(Duration) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClient.Builder
Sets connect timeout.
connectTimeout(Function<C, Duration>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClientProfile.Builder
Overrides connect timeout from config.
connectTimeout(Function<C, Duration>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder
Overrides connect timeout from config.

Returns the Content-Type header value for this multipart body.

Returns the current client when available.
current() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile
Returns the current client when available.

disabled() - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.RetryPolicy
Returns a disabled retry policy.
downloadToFile(String, Path) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Downloads content into a file.
downloadToFileAsync(String, Path) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Downloads content into a file asynchronously.
downloadToFileSmart(String, Path) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Downloads content into a file, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.

Adds a file part with a detected content type.

Adds a file part with custom content type and filename.
followRedirects(boolean) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient.Builder
Overrides redirect behavior.

Overrides redirect behavior from config.

Overrides redirect behavior from config.

G

get(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a GET request and returns the response body as string.
getAsync(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a GET request asynchronously.
getJson(String, Class<T>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a GET request and deserializes the JSON response into a type.
getJsonAsync(String, Class<T>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a GET request asynchronously and deserializes JSON response.
getJsonSmart(String, Class<T>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a GET request and deserializes JSON response, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.
getSmart(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a GET request, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.

H

Adds a default header.

Adds a default header.

Adds a static header.

Adds a config-driven header when the value is not null.
header(String, Function<C, String>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder
Adds a config-driven header when the value is not null.

Adds multiple config-driven headers.

Adds default headers.
headers(Map<String, String>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClient.Builder
Adds default headers.

Overrides the HTTP client builder used to create the client.

L

Overrides logger used for request logging.

Overrides the logger used by the client.

Overrides the logger used by the client.

Overrides logging settings.

M

MagicHttpClient - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
MagicUtils HTTP client with retries, config defaults, and JSON mapping.
MagicHttpClient.Builder - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
Builder for MagicHttpClient.
MagicHttpClientProfile<C> - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
High-level runtime profile for named MagicHttpClient instances.
MagicHttpClientProfile.Builder<C> - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
Builder for MagicHttpClientProfile.
MagicWebSocketClient - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
MagicUtils WebSocket client with config defaults and logging.
MagicWebSocketClient.Builder - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
Builder for MagicWebSocketClient.
MagicWebSocketClientProfile<C> - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
High-level runtime profile for named MagicWebSocketClient instances.
MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder<C> - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
Builder for MagicWebSocketClientProfile.
mapper() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Returns the configured Jackson mapper.
mapper(ObjectMapper) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient.Builder
Overrides JSON mapper.
mapper(ObjectMapper) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClient.Builder
Overrides JSON mapper (reserved for future extensions).
maxAttempts() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.RetryPolicy
Returns max attempts per request.
MultipartBody - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
Simple multipart/form-data builder.
MultipartBody.Builder - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
Builder for multipart/form-data content.

N

name() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClientProfile
Returns the runtime name of this profile.
name() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile
Returns the runtime name of this profile.

Calculates the next retry delay in milliseconds.

P

post(String, String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a plain-text POST request.
postAsync(String, String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a plain-text POST request asynchronously.
postJson(String, Object) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a JSON POST request.
postJson(String, Object, Class<T>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a JSON POST request and deserializes the response.
postJsonAsync(String, Object) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a JSON POST request asynchronously.
postJsonAsync(String, Object, Class<T>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a JSON POST request asynchronously and deserializes the response.
postJsonSmart(String, Object) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a JSON POST request, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.
postJsonSmart(String, Object, Class<T>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a JSON POST request and deserializes the response, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.
postMultipart(String, MultipartBody) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a multipart/form-data POST request.
postMultipartAsync(String, MultipartBody) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a multipart/form-data POST request asynchronously.
postMultipartSmart(String, MultipartBody) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a multipart/form-data POST request, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.
postSmart(String, String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a plain-text POST request, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.
publisher() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MultipartBody
Builds the body publisher for the multipart payload.

R

refresh() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClientProfile
Rebuilds the current client from the latest config.
refresh() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile
Rebuilds the current client from the latest config.
request(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Creates a request builder with defaults (base URL, headers, timeouts).
requestTimeout(Duration) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient.Builder
Overrides per-request timeout.
requestTimeout(Function<C, Duration>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClientProfile.Builder
Overrides request timeout from config.
require() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClientProfile
Returns the current client or throws when unavailable.
require() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile
Returns the current client or throws when unavailable.
retryPolicy(RetryPolicy) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient.Builder
Overrides retry policy.
RetryPolicy - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
Retry policy for HTTP requests with exponential backoff.
RetrySettings() - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.HttpClientConfig.RetrySettings
Creates default retry settings.

S

sections(String...) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClientProfile.Builder
Sets the config sections that should trigger client rebuilds.
sections(String...) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder
Sets the config sections that should trigger client rebuilds.
send(HttpRequest, HttpResponse.BodyHandler<T>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a request using the underlying client without automatic retries.
sendAsync(HttpRequest, HttpResponse.BodyHandler<T>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a request asynchronously using the underlying client without automatic retries.
sendSmart(HttpRequest, HttpResponse.BodyHandler<T>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
Sends a request, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.
shouldRetryStatus(int) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.RetryPolicy
Checks whether a status code should be retried.
shouldRetryThrowable(Throwable) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.RetryPolicy
Checks whether a throwable should be retried.
subprotocols(Function<C, List<String>>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder
Sets config-driven subprotocols.
subprotocols(List<String>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClient.Builder
Sets subprotocols for the connection.
